section.heading: Establishment of Office of the Police Corps and Law Enforcement Education

content.p: There is established in the Department of Justice, under the general authority of the Attorney General, an Office of the Police Corps and Law Enforcement Education.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 14093 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
